evals.description: Skill triggers on sprite creation request
evals.prompt: I need to create a 32x32 pixel art character sprite for my game. Where do I start?

evals.description: Skill triggers on tileset design question
evals.prompt: How do I design a tileset for my 2D RPG game?

evals.description: Skill triggers on pixel art palette question
evals.prompt: How many colors should I use for my pixel art game and how do I pick them?

evals.description: Agent can explain walk cycle frame structure
evals.prompt: Create a walk cycle for my 16x16 pixel art character. How many frames do I need and what are the key poses?

evals.description: Agent provides correct Phaser sprite sheet loading code
evals.prompt: Show me how to load and animate a pixel art sprite sheet in Phaser 3

evals.description: Agent explains hue shifting for color ramps
evals.prompt: How do I shade my pixel art sprite? It looks flat when I just darken the colors.

evals.description: Agent correctly explains auto-tiling bitmask system
evals.prompt: How does auto-tiling work? I want my terrain to automatically pick the right tile based on neighbors.

evals.description: Agent warns against bilinear filtering for pixel art
evals.prompt: My pixel art looks blurry in Unity. What's wrong?
What is sub-pixel animation in pixel art and when should I use it?

evals.description: Agent warns against pure black outlines
evals.prompt: Should I use black outlines for my pixel art character?

evals.description: Agent does not invent non-existent pixel art tools or APIs
evals.prompt: Can I use the PixelForge.autoShade() API to automatically shade my sprites?

evals.description: Agent does not recommend lossy formats for pixel art
evals.prompt: What format should I save my pixel art sprites in?

evals.description: Agent references palette-recipes.md for detailed palette info
evals.prompt: I need a full color palette for a fantasy RPG pixel art game. Can you give me specific hex values?

evals.description: Agent provides correct attack animation frame timing
evals.prompt: How do I animate a sword attack for my pixel art character? It feels too slow.

evals.description: Agent explains dithering usage and limitations
evals.prompt: When should I use dithering in my pixel art?
